items.name: Truffle Scrambled Eggs
items.description: Farm fresh eggs softly scrambled with black truffle shavings, served on toasted artisanal sourdough.

items.name: Avocado Tartine
items.description: Crushed avocado, heirloom cherry tomatoes, radish, and micro-cilantro with a drizzle of lemon-infused olive oil.

items.name: Wagyu Beef Burger
items.description: 8oz Wagyu patty, aged cheddar, caramelized onions, and house-made truffle aioli on a brioche bun. Served with hand-cut fries.

items.name: Seared Scallops
items.description: Pan-seared diver scallops, cauliflower purée, crispy pancetta, and a brown butter caper sauce.

items.name: Dry-Aged Ribeye
items.description: 14oz 45-day dry-aged bone-in ribeye, served with roasted garlic bone marrow butter and a side of duck fat potatoes.

items.name: Mushroom Risotto
items.description: Arborio rice cooked in a rich wild mushroom broth, finished with aged Parmigiano-Reggiano and white truffle oil.

items.name: Valrhona Chocolate Soufflé
items.description: Classic French soufflé made with 70% dark Valrhona chocolate, served with Tahitian vanilla bean crème anglaise.

items.name: Signature Old Fashioned
items.description: Japanese whisky, smoked maple syrup, Angostura bitters, garnished with a flamed orange peel over a large ice sphere.
